greeting: What should suyo help you do?
subtitle: Describe the result you want and add files or broader access only when needed.
noModelPlaceholder: No model available — configure a provider in Settings first
imageNeedsVisionModel: This model can't read images. Switch to a vision-capable model to send them.
safeModeEnabled: Read-only — AI can only analyze, no file changes
modeDesc_plan: AI will explore and analyze, no file changes
modeDesc_ask: AI will ask before making each change
accessDescription: Choose where the assistant can read files from for this chat.
chooseApplicationTitle: Choose an application to open this file
fileOpenOtherFailed: Could not open the file with another app
fileSourceMissing: The source file no longer exists
fileSourceNotAuthorized: This file is outside the conversation's authorized workspace
fileSourceReadFailed: The source file changed or could not be read completely
fileDiskFull: There is not enough disk space to save this file
filePermissionDenied: The selected location does not allow this file to be saved
fileSaveTargetInvalid: The selected save location is no longer available
fileApplicationInvalid: The selected application is missing or cannot open files
fileApplicationLaunchFailed: The operating system could not launch the selected application
fileRevealFailed: Could not show file in the file manager
fileVersionHistoryDescription: Local recovery versions created before the AI changed this file.
fileVersionRecoveryNotice: Before an older version is restored, the current file is saved as a new recovery version so its contents are not silently discarded.
fileVersionEmpty: This file does not have a recovery version yet.
fileVersionRestoreConfirm: Restore {{name}} to this version? The current contents will be saved as a recovery version first.
fileVersionRestoredWithRecovery: File version restored; the previous contents were saved as a recovery version
fileVersionRestoreFailed: Could not restore the file version
pptxOpenExternally: Download the original file and open it with PowerPoint, WPS Office, LibreOffice, or another trusted presentation app.
pptxLegacyTitle: Legacy PPT preview is not supported
pptxLegacyUnsupported: This is a legacy .ppt file. To avoid unsafe conversion, suyo will not parse it as PPTX; download it or open it in a local presentation app.
pptxInvalidFile: This file is not a valid PPTX presentation, or it is damaged.
pptxLimitExceeded: This presentation exceeds the safe preview limits. The original file can still be downloaded or opened externally.
pptxPreviewTimedOut: The presentation could not be rendered within the preview time limit.
pptxPreviewBusy: Another presentation preview is being generated. Try again shortly.
pptxStaticNotice: This is an offline static preview; animations, transitions, fonts, and advanced effects may differ from the original.
pptxExternalLinksIgnored: External links were ignored and no network requests were made.
pptxEmbeddedContentIgnored: Macros, video, OLE, and other embedded content were ignored.
pptxUnsupportedImage: Some image formats, dimensions, or contents were not safe to preview and are shown as placeholders.
pptxImageBudgetExceeded: The image preview memory limit was reached; remaining images are shown in degraded form.
pptxTextTruncated: Excess presentation text was truncated in the preview.
pptxShapeLimitExceeded: Excess shapes were omitted from the preview.
pptxTableLimitExceeded: An oversized table is shown as a placeholder.
pptxGroupApproximated: Grouped shapes are shown in degraded form.
pptxShapeApproximated: Some complex shapes are approximated with basic outlines.
pptxUnsupportedElementWarning: Some elements could not be rendered completely in the static preview.
pptxSceneLimitExceeded: This presentation contains too much content, so some preview nodes were omitted to keep the viewer responsive.
pptxDownloadLimitExceeded: The original is larger than 50 MiB and will not be downloaded through browser memory. Open it with an external app from the local desktop instead.
conversationLocateFailedRetry: Could not locate this turn. Retry
conversationEditReconcileFailed: The edit was saved, but the latest messages could not be refreshed. Staying in history until the connection recovers.
contextCompactBusy: Compaction is unavailable while generation is running
contextCompactThreshold: Manual compaction unlocks at 50% context usage
contextCompactNoVisibleResult: Compaction finished without a visible AI summary
contextCompressed: Context was compressed to fit limits
stopFailed: Could not confirm that the task stopped. It may still be running; try Stop again.
inputWhileRunningPlaceholder: The task is running — add a follow-up
inputDeliveryMode: Choose how to handle this input
inputModeQueueDescription: Run it in order as the next message after the current task finishes.
inputModeSteerDescription: Apply it at the next safe boundary; a running tool will not be interrupted mid-operation.
inputSteerActionHint: Steer at the next safe boundary (Enter)
inputSteerSubmitted: Steer submitted; it will apply at a safe boundary
inputSentAfterTaskFinished: The previous task just finished, so this was sent as a normal message
inputQueueFailed: Could not submit the follow-up; your text and files were kept
inputCancelFailed: Could not cancel this pending input
inputExecutionFailed: A queued follow-up could not be completed
pendingInputsRunningHint: Runs in order after the current task; use More actions to steer instead.
pendingInputsIdleHint: These messages have not run yet; edit or cancel them.
inputRestoreAria: Move pending input {{position}} back to composer
inputRestoreDraftBusy: Send or clear the current draft first
inputSteerAria: Use queued message {{position}} to steer the current task
inputUpdateFailed: Could not update the queued message; try again
taskMayBeStalled: Still running with no new progress
taskMayBeStalledHint: You can keep typing; new messages will be queued in order.
editRegenerateHint: Sending will regenerate the response from this point
agentQuestion: The agent has a question for you:
agentQuestionMissing: The question did not load correctly. Ask the AI to restate it before answering.
agentQuestionRequestAgain: Ask the AI to restate it
agentQuestionRetryAnswer: The question was empty. Please restate what you need to ask.
suggestSummarize: Summarize key numbers and trends in a table
suggestExtract: Extract decisions, risks, and next actions
suggestConvert: Convert slides into an executive brief
suggestCompare: Compare all files and produce one consolidated output
capDocumentDraftingDesc: Create emails, reports, summaries, and briefs
capSpreadsheetAnalysisDesc: Summarize data and extract business insights
capInformationRetrievalDesc: Find facts across files and conversations
capWebResearchDesc: Gather recent references from the web
capFileOrganizationDesc: Read and classify local files, then suggest an organization plan
capDataExtractionDesc: Extract readable text and key data from PDFs and documents
capBatchProcessingDesc: Process multiple files in one go with consistent rules
capEmailComposeDesc: Draft professional emails from context and notes
starterOrganizeBillsPrompt: Find invoices and receipts in the current workspace, then produce a monthly inventory and summary spreadsheet without accessing files outside the workspace.
starterSummarizeFolderPrompt: Read all documents in my current workspace folder and produce a concise summary of each file with key takeaways.
starterCleanupFilesPrompt: Analyze my workspace folder, identify duplicate or outdated files, and suggest which ones to archive or delete.
starterDraftFromNotesPrompt: Find my recent meeting notes and draft a professional follow-up email with action items and deadlines.
starterCompareDocsPrompt: Choose two readable documents in the current workspace, compare their contents item by item, and summarize the key differences.
starterWeeklyDigestPrompt: Scan my workspace for documents modified this week and compile a digest with the title and one-line summary of each.
mediaPreviewTooLarge: Media is too large to preview (maximum 50 MB)
imagePreviewTooLarge: Image is too large to preview (maximum 50 MB)
currentResponseMetricsScope: This covers only the current response/activity, not cumulative Goal usage.
activityAdjustmentGroup_one: Automatic adjustment · {{count}} attempt did not complete
activityAdjustmentGroup_other: Automatic adjustment · {{count}} attempts did not complete
activityAdjustmentGroupDesc: Continued with another approach and completed the task
goalEmptyDescription: Type "/goal + the outcome you want" to set a goal that persists across turns.
goalMobileDescription: View and control the persistent goal for this conversation.
goalObjectivePlaceholder: Describe the outcome, constraints, and how to verify it
goalDefinitionOfDonePlaceholder: What evidence will prove this goal is complete?
goalTokenBudgetDefault: Leave blank for no token limit
goalTokenBudgetInvalid: The token budget must be a whole number of 0 or greater.
goalTokenBudgetMaximumError: The total token budget cannot exceed {{maximum}}.
goalTokenBudgetHint: This is the cumulative total-context budget, including cache reads (maximum {{maximum}}); {{used}} tokens have been used.
goalTokenBudgetUsedHint: There is no token limit; {{used}} total-context tokens, including cache reads, have been recorded. Cost, active-time, and continuation safety limits still apply.
goalEditDescription: Editing creates a new revision. The current tool action is not force-stopped; the new objective takes effect at the next safe boundary.
goalUpdateFailed: Could not update the goal. Check its latest state and try again.
goalRevisionConflict: The goal changed elsewhere. Its latest revision was refreshed; edit it again.
goalNeedsReviewDescription: The previous run may have an uncertain outcome. Review it before continuing.
goalBudgetLimitedDescription: The goal reached its configured execution budget.
goalBudgetUsage: Goal budget usage (total context, includes cache reads)
goalPauseFailed: The pause was not confirmed. The goal may still be running.
goalResumeFailed: Could not resume the goal. Check its latest state.
goalIncreaseBudgetFirst: Increase the exhausted budget in Edit before resuming.
goalClearFailed: Could not clear the goal. Check its latest state.
goalClearPauseFirst: Pause the active run and wait for its safe boundary before clearing the goal.
goalClearConfirmDescription: This removes the persistent goal. Active runs must be safely paused first; todos and conversation history are kept.
goalCommandObjectiveRequired: Add an objective after the create or edit command.
goalCommandObjectiveTooLong: The objective must be no more than {{limit}} characters (currently {{count}}).
goalCommandUnexpectedArgument: This goal command does not accept extra content.
goalCommandAttachmentsUnsupported: Attachments can only be used when creating a goal. Remove them before running this command.
goalCommandUnavailable: Goal commands are not available in this composer yet.
goalCommandFailed: The goal command could not be completed. Your draft was kept; try again.
goalCommandSessionRequired: Open a conversation before editing, pausing, resuming, or clearing its goal.
taskBatchAttachmentsUnsupported: Task batches do not support attachments yet.
taskBatchIncomplete: Each task needs a title and prompt.
planSelectText: Select text in the preview to add comments
planFeedbackPlaceholder: Tell Claude what to do instead
questionPreviewPlaceholder: Select an option to see preview
officeApproximatePreviewNotice: This is a structural approximation; fonts, charts, and pagination may differ from desktop Office.
officeRenderingPreview: Generating the local paged Office preview…
officePreviewFailedSafely: The Office preview did not pass integrity checks for the current file version, so the old image was removed.
officeFormulaNotRecalculated: Formulas were not recalculated by Excel
userOfficeTemplateBetaNotice: Beta: templates stay scoped to this verified workspace. Only a server-approved authoritative revision can be used to create an Office file.
userOfficeTemplateLoadFailed: User Office templates could not be loaded safely.
userOfficeTemplateFileHelp: DOCX, XLSX, or PPTX only; maximum 75 MiB.
userOfficeTemplateSchemaHelp: Declare the exact placeholders already present in the file. Beta supports required text fields with explicit min_chars and max_chars only; the sample shows the complete field shape.
userOfficeTemplateFileTypeInvalid: Choose a DOCX, XLSX, or PPTX file.
userOfficeTemplateFileTooLarge: The template exceeds the 75 MiB Beta limit.
userOfficeTemplateEmpty: No user Office templates in this workspace yet.
userOfficeTemplateReferenceCopyFailed: Template reference could not be copied
userOfficeTemplateUnavailable: Unavailable for Office file creation until the server marks this revision approved.
userOfficeTemplatePreviewFailed: The private template preview could not be loaded safely.
userOfficeTemplateApproveConfirm: Approve the authoritative evidence for "{{name}}"? This enables Office file creation for this exact revision.
userOfficeTemplateDeleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" from this workspace? Existing files are not removed.
runtimeLoadFailed: Version history is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
runtimeWorkspaceIdentityMismatch: This folder no longer matches the saved version history. Select the folder again and retry.
runtimeProtectionReadyDesc: You can restore an earlier saved version at any time.
runtimeAdvancedOptionsDesc: For isolated editing and troubleshooting; no setup is needed for everyday use.
runtimeWorktreeDirty: The isolated copy has unsaved version changes, so it cannot be closed yet.
runtimeWorktreeCreateConfirm: Create and switch to an isolated copy? The original folder will not be changed.
runtimeWorktreeReleaseConfirm: Finish isolated editing and return to the original folder? Unsaved version changes will block this action.
runtimeWorktreeCreated: Created and switched to an isolated copy
runtimeWorktreeFailed: The action was not completed. The original folder was not affected.
runtimeWorktreeUnavailableRepository: Version management is not enabled for this folder, so an isolated copy cannot be created.
runtimeWorktreeUnavailableDirty: This folder has version changes waiting to be saved. Handle them and try again.
runtimeWorktreeUnavailableGit: The version-management component was not found on this computer.
runtimeWorktreeUnavailableTimeout: The folder check timed out. Try again shortly.
runtimeWorktreeUnavailableStorage: Storage for isolated copies is temporarily unavailable.
runtimeWorktreeUnavailableWorkspace: This folder type does not support isolated copies.
runtimeWorktreeUnavailableGeneric: An isolated copy cannot be created right now.
runtimeWorktreeErrorRepository: This folder does not support isolated copies. The original folder was not affected.
runtimeWorktreeErrorDirty: The folder has version changes waiting to be saved. Handle them and try again.
runtimeWorktreeErrorActive: The isolated copy is still in use and cannot be closed yet.
runtimeWorktreeErrorConflict: The folder state changed, so the action stopped safely.
runtimeWorktreeErrorGitUnavailable: The version-management component was not found, so no action was taken.
runtimeWorktreeErrorTimeout: The action timed out. The original folder was not affected; try again.
runtimeWorktreeErrorGitFailed: The isolated-copy action failed. The original folder was not affected.
runtimeWorktreeErrorAudit: The security log is temporarily unavailable, so the action was stopped.
runtimeRewindConfirm: Restore {{count}} files and this task's conversation progress to this version?
runtimeExternalEffectsWarning: Sent email, cloud changes, and similar actions cannot be undone automatically.
runtimeRewindBlocked: This version cannot be restored safely right now.
runtimeRewindFailed: Restore was not completed. Existing files were not replaced.
interactionRecoveryNeeded: Confirmation was submitted, but continuation status is unavailable.
setupProvider: Choose a model source to start
setupProviderDesc: Use Rapid-MLX or Ollama locally, connect a local endpoint, or add your own provider key.
imageGenerationCostRisk: The image prompt is sent to an external provider. The displayed amount is a catalog estimate; promotions, pricing, and billing rules may change, and the provider bill is authoritative.
imageGenerationApprovalPerCall: This approval authorizes one image only; every later generation requires a new confirmation.
permissionNotificationBody: The assistant wants to use {{tool}} and needs your approval.
permissionRememberExactScope: Remember only for this exact scope: {{pattern}}
